source.sourcePath: raw/sources/DHF (인허가)/03_A1417MCW, A1717MCW, F1417MCW/05_설계개발 검증 및 유효성 확인/15_규격 Test/6. [A1717MCW] (Wireless) EMC Test report.pdf

sourceSummary.oneLine: EMC test report for H&abyz A1717MCW Digital Flat Panel X-ray Detector tested to EN 301 489-1, EN 301 489-3, and EN 301 489-17.
sourceSummary.officialUse: Supports regulatory EMC evidence for the tested A1717MCW sample under applied European harmonised EMC standards.
keyPoints: Product identified as Digital Flat Panel X-ray Detector, model A1717MCW, trade mark H&abyz.
Issued date is October 04, 2022; project reference number is NK-22-E-0815.
Radiated emission, electrostatic discharge, and RF electromagnetic field tests were reported as Pass or Compliant.
Final decision states the equipment under test complies to all requirements of the applied test standards.
No recorded deviations to the applied standards were reported.

entities.name: H&abyz Co., Ltd.
entities.evidence: Applicant Company Name: H&abyz Co., Ltd.; Manufacturer Company Name: H&abyz Co., Ltd.

entities.name: Digital Flat Panel X-ray Detector
entities.evidence: Product Digital Flat Panel X-ray Detector; Category: Digital Flat Panel X-ray Detector

entities.name: Nemko Korea Co., Ltd.
entities.evidence: Location Nemko Korea Co., Ltd. 155, 153 and 159, Osan-ro, Mohyeon-eup, Cheoin-gu, Yongin-si, Gyeonggi-do 16885, Republic of Korea

entities.name: KOLAS Accredited Lab.
entities.evidence: KOLAS Accredited Lab. (Korea Laboratory Accreditation Scheme) Registration No. KT155

concepts.name: Electromagnetic compatibility test report
concepts.evidence: A1717MCW EMC Test Report Reference No.:NK-22-E-0815

concepts.name: EN 301 489-1 common EMC requirements
concepts.evidence: EN 301 489-1 V2.2.3:2019 : Electromagnetic compatibility (EMC) standard for radio equipment and services; Part 1: Common technical requirements

concepts.name: EN 301 489-3 short-range device EMC conditions
concepts.evidence: EN 301 489-3 V2.1.1:2019 : ElectroMagnetic Compatibility (EMC) standard for radio equipment and services; Part 3: Specific conditions for Short-Range Devices (SRD)

concepts.name: EN 301 489-17 broadband data transmission EMC conditions
concepts.evidence: EN 301 489-17 V3.2.4:2020 : Electromagnetic compatibility (EMC) standard for radio equipment and services; Part 17: Specific conditions for Broadband Data Transmission Systems

concepts.name: Radiated emissions testing
concepts.evidence: Radiated emission (Below 1 ㎓) EN 55032:2015 Pass; Radiated emission (Above 1 ㎓) EN 55032:2015 Pass

evidence.claim: The report applies to the A1717MCW Digital Flat Panel X-ray Detector.
evidence.evidenceText: Product Digital Flat Panel X-ray Detector; Model A1717MCW

evidence.claim: The report reference number is NK-22-E-0815.
The report was issued on October 04, 2022.
The A1717MCW sample was tested according to EN 301 489-1 V2.2.3:2019, EN 301 489-3 V2.1.1:2019, and EN 301 489-17 V3.2.4:2020.
The applicant and manufacturer are H&abyz Co., Ltd.
evidence.evidenceText: Applicant Company Name: H&abyz Co., Ltd.; Manufacturer Company Name: H&abyz Co., Ltd.

evidence.claim: Nemko Korea Co., Ltd. performed the testing at its Yongin-si, Gyeonggi-do location.
evidence.evidenceText: Location Nemko Korea Co., Ltd. 155, 153 and 159, Osan-ro, Mohyeon-eup, Cheoin-gu, Yongin-si, Gyeonggi-do 16885, Republic of Korea

evidence.claim: The test lab is identified as a KOLAS accredited lab with registration number KT155.
evidence.evidenceText: KOLAS Accredited Lab. (Korea Laboratory Accreditation Scheme) Registration No. KT155

evidence.claim: The EUT rated voltage is DC 16 V, 3 A.
The EUT was tested under 2.4 GHz WiFi and 5 GHz WiFi conditions.
evidence.evidenceText: It was also tested under 2.4 GHz WiFi, 5 GHz WiFi conditions.

evidence.claim: Radiated emission below and above 1 GHz passed under EN 55032:2015.
evidence.evidenceText: Radiated emission (Below 1 ㎓) EN 55032:2015 Pass; Radiated emission (Above 1 ㎓) EN 55032:2015 Pass

evidence.claim: Electrostatic discharge testing under EN 61000-4-2:2009 passed and was compliant.
evidence.evidenceText: Electrostatic discharge EN 61000-4-2:2009 Pass; Result Compliant

evidence.claim: RF electromagnetic field testing under EN 61000-4-3:2006/A1:2008/A2:2010 passed and was compliant.
evidence.evidenceText: RF electromagnetic field EN 61000-4-3:2006/A1:2008/A2:2010 Pass; Result Compliant

evidence.claim: No operation errors were detected during and after electrostatic discharges.
evidence.evidenceText: No operation errors were detected during and after the discharges.

evidence.claim: No operation errors were detected during and after RF electromagnetic field exposures.
evidence.evidenceText: No operation errors were detected during and after the exposures.

evidence.claim: The final decision states that the equipment under test complies with all requirements of the applied test standards.
evidence.evidenceText: The equipment under test complies to all requirements of the applied test standards.

evidence.claim: No recorded deviations to the applied standards were reported.
evidence.evidenceText: No recorded deviations to the applied standards.

reviewFlags.reason: The document references Competent Authorities in Europe and EU directives through harmonised standards, but it does not identify a specific issuing regulatory authority.
RevisionOrVersion uses the visible form identifier NKQF-27-22 (Rev. 1); no separate report revision number is stated.
